title: Why Fades A Dream?
content:
Why fades a dream?
    An iridescent ray
    Flecked in between the tryst
    Of night and day.
    Why fades a dream?--
    Of consciousness the shade
    Wrought out by lack of light and made
    Upon life's stream.
    Why fades a dream?

    That thought may thrive,
    So fades the fleshless dream;
    Lest men should learn to trust
    The things that seem.
    So fades a dream,
    That living thought may grow
    And like a waxing star-beam glow
    Upon life's stream--
    So fades a dream.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Laurence Dunbar delivers a powerful performance in "Why Fades A Dream?"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
